A Relic Reborn._line: The 2.x Zodiac questline — start 'A Relic Reborn' from the Weaponsmith of Gridania in Old Gridania.
A Relic Reborn.Atma: Farm 12 Atma from FATEs across the original A Realm Reborn zones (one per element).
A Relic Reborn.Animus: Complete the nine Trials of the Braves books (dungeons, FATEs, leves and enemies).
A Relic Reborn.Nexus: Fill the weapon with Light by running duties while it is equipped.
A Relic Reborn.Zeta: Fill nine Mahatma with Light to finish the Zodiac Zeta.

Anima Weapons._line: The Heavensward Anima questline — start 'Soul Without Life' in Idyllshire.

Eureka Weapons._line: Progressed entirely inside The Forbidden Land, Eureka — farm the matching zone's crystals and light, then turn in to Gerolt.
Eureka Weapons.Base: Claim the base Eurekan weapon from Gerolt after starting the Eureka quest line in Rhalgr's Reach.
Eureka Weapons.Eureka: Trade Eureka Fragments (from Eureka Hydatos and the Baldesion Arsenal) toward the Physeos upgrade.
Eureka Weapons.Physeos: Final form — trade further Eureka Fragments to Gerolt in Eureka Hydatos.

Resistance Weapons._line: The Bozja / Save the Queen questline — start 'Hail to the Queen' in Kugane.

Manderville Weapons._line: The Endwalker Manderville questline from Jubrunnah in Radz-at-Han — each step also needs a tomestone-bought material.

Phantom Weapons._line: The Dawntrail relic questline from the Occult Crescent (South Horn) — trade Arcanite earned there.

Lucis Tools._line: ARR Disciple of the Hand & Land relic tools — start the quest 'Just Tooling Around' from Guiding Star in Mor Dhona (X:21.9, Y:6.9). Three stages: Mastercraft (IL55) → Supra (IL75) → Lucis (IL90).
Lucis Tools.Mastercraft: Base IL55 tools earned through your level 50 Disciple of the Hand or Land class quest. Each crafter tool is a level 50 three-star craft; no relic currency needed yet.
Lucis Tools.Supra: IL75 tools (patch 2.3) from Talan in Mor Dhona (X:22, Y:6). Every class trades its Mastercraft tool plus 1 Mastercraft Demimateria and 2 Fieldcraft Demimateria III. Crafters make a class-specific item from a gathered material (mostly an Unspoiled Node item) and fold in the 2 Fieldcraft Demimateria III. Gatherers turn in a Talan Seal instead: Miner 30 Antumbral Rock, Botanist 30 Redolent Log, Fisher 1 Olgoi-Khorkhoi (catch a Storm Rider, then mooch it during Heat Waves).
Lucis Tools.Lucis: IL90 tools (patch 2.5) from Talan. Every class trades its Supra tool plus 5 Moonstone (about 4,000 gil each, 20,000 total). Crafters make a class-specific final item costing roughly 36,500 gil all-in (Weaver a touch more at ~37,400, Culinarian much less at ~29,150). Gatherers turn in a Talan Mastery Seal: each needs a gathered item plus 15 of a Fieldcraft Leve item — Miner 15 Magicked Oilcloth + 30 Antumbral Rock, Botanist 15 Bamboo Paper + 30 Redolent Log, Fisher 15 Glacier Crystal + 10 Gigant Clam.

Skysteel Tools._line: Heavensward Disciple of the Hand & Land tools, built at the Skysteel Manufactory in the Firmament. Hand-ins go to Denys (X:8.0, Y:10.0), with collectable turn-ins to Spanner and quest steps via Nimie and Emeny. Six stages: Skysteel → Skysteel +1 → Dragonsung → Augmented Dragonsung → Skysung → Skybuilders'. From the Augmented Dragonsung step on, your current tool must be equipped while you gather or fish the upgrade items.
Skysteel Tools.Skysteel: Base IL440 tools. Finish the quest 'Mislaid Plans' for a Skysteel Prototype Coffer, which becomes your current class's tool; extra classes' base tools cost 80,000 gil from Denys. Crafters then craft the upgrade collectables (tool equipped); Miner/Botanist gather the upgrade items from set nodes; Fisher buys a Signature Skyball lure and catches the upgrade fish.
Skysteel Tools.Skysteel +1: First upgrade (IL455), handed to Denys. Crafters: craft 20 of the tool's first-tier collectable — each uses one 'Oddly Specific' material (20 Purple Crafters' Scrips at a Scrip Exchange, or Market Board; ~400 scrips per tool) plus a gathered item; Atrociraptor Skin and Vampire Vine Sap aren't gatherable (Hunting ventures or Bicolor traders). Miner/Botanist: gather 340 first-tier items + 120 hidden items from the same nodes. Fisher: catch 40 Thinker's Coral at the Thaliak River, Dravanian Hinterlands.
Skysteel Tools.Dragonsung: Second upgrade (IL475), handed to Denys, then finish the one-time quest 'In Everyone's Best Interests'. Crafters: craft 30 of the second-tier recipe (~600 Purple Crafters' Scrips of 'Oddly Specific' mats, plus gathered mats and an intermediate craft; Zonure Skin and Ovim Fleece from Hunting/Bicolor, Ala Mhigan Salt Crystal is a timed node in The Lochs). Miner/Botanist: gather 510 second-tier items + 180 hidden. Fisher: catch 60 Dragonspine at Dragonspit, Coerthas Western Highlands.
Skysteel Tools.Augmented Dragonsung: Third upgrade (IL485) — talk to Nimie (tool equipped or in your bag) for 'Ever Skyward'. From here the tool must be equipped while gathering/fishing. Crafters: craft 18 third-tier collectables at max collectability → 90 gobbiegoo from Denys → give to Nimie (each craft ~20 Purple/Skybuilders' Scrips; collectability returns 2/3/5, so 18 crafts best / 45 worst). Miner/Botanist: gather 500 third-tier + 180 hidden → 50 gobbiegoo, handed to Nimie with the 180 hidden. Fisher: catch 60 Petal Shell at Plum Spring, Yanxia → 6 Fisher's Gobbiegoo to Nimie.
Skysteel Tools.Skysung: Fourth upgrade (IL500) — talk to Nimie for 'The Tools of Tomorrow', then finish 'Oddness in the End'. Crafters: craft 21 fourth-tier collectables at max collectability → 105 highly viscous gobbiegoo → Nimie (~420 best / 1,060 worst Purple or Skybuilders' Scrips; 2/3/5 per turn-in). Miner/Botanist: gather 600 fourth-tier + 200 hidden → 60 highly viscous gobbiegoo, handed to Nimie with the 200 hidden. Fisher: catch 70 Allagan Hunter at the Alpha Quadrant, Azys Lla → 7 Highly Viscous Fisher's Gobbiegoo to Nimie.
Skysteel Tools.Skybuilders': Final upgrade (IL510) — talk to Emeny for 'The Pinnacle of Possibility'; collectables go to Spanner, then Emeny. Crafters (Expert Recipes — fixed macros work): craft 20 fifth-tier collectables at max collectability → 60 oddly delicate parts → Emeny (~400 Purple / 600 Skybuilders' Scrips best, 1,200 / 1,800 worst; non-currency mats are gathered in The Diadem). Miner/Botanist: gather 36 fifth-tier collectables + 750 Diadem items → 250 oddly delicate parts + 25 inconceivably delicate parts → Emeny (Diadem central isle). Fisher: gather 50 each of Flintstrike and Pickled Pom collectables at max collectability → 200 Oddly Delicate Fishing Rod Parts + 200 Fishing Reel Parts → Emeny.

Resplendent Tools._line: Shadowbringers crafter/gatherer relic — craft collectables and turn them in to Limbeth in Eulmore across several stages, finishing with 60 of the final material (Purple Crafters' Scrips).

Splendorous Tools._line: The Endwalker Splendorous Tool questline — start with Mowen's Merchant in Radz-at-Han.

Cosmic Tools._line: Dawntrail crafter/gatherer relic — earned through Cosmic Exploration on Sinus Ardorum; no crafting materials, just research and mission deliveries.

Eurekan Armor._line: The Forbidden Land, Eureka (from Gerolt). Elemental set: base 40 Pyros Crystal, +1 +Hydatos (50 body/legs, 30 small), +2 +Eureka Fragment (35 body/legs, 21 small). Eurekan/Artifact set (Anemos line): 50 Protean (base), 150 (+1), 400 (+2), then 150 Anemos Crystal for the final Anemos stage — per piece.

Resistance Armor._line: From the Resistance Supplier. Bozjan (Southern Front) = Bozjan Coin (98/set). Augmented Bozjan = base piece + Bozjan Runner's Secrets (999/500 coin each or rare Castrum drops; ~3,498/set). Law's Order (Gangos) = Bozjan Gold Coin (12/set). Augmented Law's Order = Law's Order + Augmented Bozjan + Orderly Runner's Secrets, each made from 10 slot-specific Runner's Plating (Head/Body/Hand/Leg/Foot — 5 different items, 50 total/set; Delubrum Reginae Savage). Blade's (Zadnor) = Bozjan Platinum Coin (36/set).

Phantom Armor._line: The Occult Crescent (South Horn). Arcanaut's base = 4,000 Enlightenment Silver Piece/piece (20,000/set). +1 adds 3 Aetherspun Silver (≈1,200 Silver each) + 3 Aetherial Fixative (≈1,600 Gold each) per piece. +2 adds 3 Aetherspun Gold (treasure chests) + 6 X-Fixative (= 60 Sanguinite) per piece.
